violations.text: Per interview of staff, establishment sanitizes hot roller with a vinegar and water solution. Vinegar water solution is not an approved sanitizer. Establishment must discontinue using vinegar water solution. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025

Food was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit in the open air cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The ambient air temperature was observed at 38-41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The temperature was adjusted at time of inspection. Establishment must monitor unit to ensure time/temperature control for safety foods are held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025

Establishment provides ingredient and allergen information of self-serve food items (Tornados) via a QR code and a physical copy (if requested). The QR code ingredient information and physical copy information do not match up. QR code and physical copy must match. Establishment must correct the differences. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (in a wet bag) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Ice scoop was washed, rinsed, and sanitized at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025
